label: Landmark
description: Defines a named world-map landmark: a special tile that combines required and optional TileMutatorDefs, a world icon, and optional coast rotation behavior.

workerClass.label: Worker class
workerClass.description: C# class that implements the landmark generation and placement logic. Defaults to RimWorld.Landmark.

commonality.label: Commonality
commonality.description: Relative weight used by WorldGenStep_Landmarks when choosing among valid landmarks for a tile. Higher values are chosen more often.

mutatorChances.label: Mutator chances
mutatorChances.description: Weighted TileMutatorDef list for this landmark. Each child element name is the TileMutatorDef defName; scalar text is the chance; Required="True" marks mandatory mutators.

comboLandmarkMutators.label: Combo landmark mutators
comboLandmarkMutators.description: Additional mutators applied when this landmark overlaps with another compatible landmark. Same format as mutatorChances.

nameMaker.label: Name maker
nameMaker.description: RulePackDef used to generate a name for this landmark on the world map.

iconTexturePath.label: Icon texture path
iconTexturePath.description: Content path to the world icon texture for this landmark. Not translated.

atlasSize.label: Atlas size
atlasSize.description: Size of this landmark's slot in the world icon texture atlas, as '(columns, rows)'. Defaults to (1, 1).

drawScale.label: Draw scale
drawScale.description: Uniform scale multiplier applied when rendering the landmark icon on the world map. Defaults to 1.

drawType.label: Draw type
drawType.description: Rendering mode for the landmark icon. Standard draws the icon normally; TerrainMask blends it with the underlying terrain.

coastRotateMode.label: Coast rotate mode
coastRotateMode.description: Whether and how the landmark icon rotates relative to a nearby coast. None disables rotation; ToCoast faces toward a coast tile; AwayFromCoast faces away.

drawAboveRoads.label: Draw above roads
drawAboveRoads.description: When true, the landmark icon is rendered above road overlays on the world map.

category.label: Category
category.description: Grouping tag for this landmark. Not displayed to players; used internally to group related landmark types. Not translated.

terrainParameters.label: Terrain parameters
terrainParameters.description: Shader property overrides applied to the terrain material on this landmark tile. Each child element name is a shader property identifier; scalar text is the value.
